analysis.reasoning: Core message: Emphasizes solidarity and mutual respect as unifying EU values during and after the coronavirus crisis, and points to a Joint European Roadmap. Evaluation: EU1 (EU is a successful story) – partially related to values, but no historical framing or overcoming past obstacles; not clearly promoted. EU2 (EU is united) – yes: explicit emphasis on solidarity keeping "us" united and hashtags like #StrongerTogether signal present unity. EU3 (EU is useful for its citizens) – yes: references a practical "Joint European Roadmap" for releasing emergency measures, implying proactive, coordinated EU guidance that benefits citizens. EU4 (avant-garde) – no mention of pioneering regulation beyond crisis management. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not applicable; no human rights/democracy focus. EU6 (better world globally) – not applicable; focus is internal to the EU. Conclusion: EU2 and EU3 are promoted.
